topics.title: TIFF Announces Star-Studded Gala and Special Presentations, Led by ‘Rocky’ Biopic ‘I Play Rocky’
topics.angle: The Toronto International Film Festival has announced its initial lineup, including premieres for a 'Rocky' biopic and a film starring Chris Rock.

sources.headline: TIFF Announces Star-Studded Gala and Special Presentations, Led by ‘Rocky’ Biopic ‘I Play Rocky’ and Chris Rock’s ‘Misty Green’
sources.summary: On Monday, the 2026 Toronto International Film Festival announced its hotly anticipated Gala and Special Presentations programs, showcasing feature films from close to 30 countries along with celebrated directors such as Danny Boyle, Pedro Almodóvar, Cristian Mungiu, Chris Rock, Mike Leigh, Ryûsuke Hamaguchi, Hirokazu Kore-eda and many more. Some of the highlights of the Special [ ]

sources.headline: Toronto Fest Adds Peter Farrelly, Chris Rock, Lauren Miller Rogen World Premieres
sources.summary: TIFF also booked the latest films by Wayne Wang, Danny Boyle, Pedro Almodovar, Mike Leigh and Jesse Eisenberg as it laid out upcoming Gala and Special Presentation titles.

sources.headline: TIFF 2026 Lineup: I Play Rocky, Films by Chris Rock and Rebel Wilson Set Premieres
sources.summary: With more than 60 titles, the Toronto International Film Festival slate also includes movies from Courteney Cox, Wayne Wang and Tim Blake Nelson The post TIFF 2026 Lineup: I Play Rocky, Films by Chris Rock and Rebel Wilson Set Premieres appeared first on TheWrap .

sources.headline: TIFF Galas and Special Presentations Include Cannes Hits Like Fjord, Club Kid, Minotaur, La Bola Negra, and More
sources.summary: The annual festival's most eye-catching sections have today added a selection of world premieres and already-minted contenders from Sundance to Cannes.

topics.title: Lewis Pullman to Star Opposite Julia Garner in Apple TV+ Thriller 'Guilty Creatures'
topics.angle: Lewis Pullman is set to star opposite Julia Garner in the upcoming Apple TV+ thriller series 'Guilty Creatures.'

sources.headline: Lewis Pullman Joins Julia Garner in Apple TV Thriller Guilty Creatures
sources.summary: Lewis Pullman is set to star opposite Julia Garner in the upcoming Apple TV series Guilty Creatures, Variety has learned. The show, with Garner as a lead and executive producer, was announced on July 6. It is an adaptation of the Mikita Brottman true crime book “Guilty Creatures: Sex, God, and Murder in Tallahassee, Florida. [ ]

sources.headline: Lewis Pullman Joins Julia Garner In ‘Guilty Creatures’ Apple TV Series From Tomorrow Studios
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Lewis Pullman (Remarkably Bright Creatures, Lessons in Chemistry) is returning to television and to Apple TV with a starring role opposite Julia Garner in Guilty Creatures, a thriller drama from director Craig Gillespie, showrunner Stuart Zicherman and Tomorrow Studios. Adapted for the screen by Sarah DeLappe from Mikita Brottman‘s true-crime book Guilty [ ]

sources.headline: Bong Joon Ho s First Animated Feature Ally, With a Voice Cast Including Bradley Cooper and Ayo Edebiri, Sell Globally for Pathé (EXCLUSIVE)
sources.summary: Bong Joon-Ho s first animated feature has proved a hit with international buyers, securing multiple deals for Pathé. Ally, which launched at the Marche du Film, had already been acquired by Neon for the U.S. prior to Cannes, reuniting the Oscar-winning director with the distributor following their hugely successful collaboration on Parasite, which won the Palme [ ]

sources.headline: Utopai Studios Producing AI-Assisted Animated Movie ‘The Most Serious Fart’ by ‘Not Another Teen Movie’ Writer (EXCLUSIVE)
sources.summary: In an era where AI can help make films about anything and everything, Utopai Studios has landed on farts. topics.angle: Comedian Kelsey Cook is set to release her debut Netflix stand-up special, 'Happy Hour'.

sources.headline: Kelsey Cook Sets Netflix Stand-Up Special Happy Hour
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Comedian Kelsey Cook is set to unveil her debut Netflix special, Happy Hour, on Tuesday, August 18. In the special, following up last year s Mark Your Territory and 2023 s The Hustler, Cook explores hangxiety, relives a plane bathroom nightmare, and breaks down dating a literal Chad. She filmed it at the Fitzgerald Theater in St. Paul, Minnesota with Eric [ ]
